title: COOS-7 Cells Out-of-Sample Microscopy Dataset

data_urls.access_notes: Public Zenodo record referenced by the COOS paper.
Use the paper to recover split semantics and experimental metadata.

instructions: Download the Zenodo files or a task-specific subset after checking available disk.
Recover the original train/test and out-of-sample labels from the paper and metadata.
Keep experiment, sample, microscope/day, and class metadata available for leakage checks.

scale.download_size: several GB reported in prior COOS materials; feasible but not instant

recommended_axes.name: experiment_reproduction_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Whether cell images come from the same reproduced experiment, sample, day, or acquisition condition.

recommended_axes.name: image_embedding_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Nearest-neighbor support in a frozen image-encoder or morphology-feature space.

recommended_axes.name: class_conditional_style_similarity
recommended_axes.definition: Image intensity, texture, and acquisition-style support within each biological class.

useful_for: Testing whether image classifiers rely on acquisition style rather than class biology.
Small-to-medium hard discovery benchmark for SPECTRA agents.
leakage_risks: Images from the same sample or experiment can leak acquisition artifacts.
Class and acquisition condition can be confounded.
Embedding similarity must be computed from frozen models or train-only fitted features.
